title: Smoky Cheesy Syrian Tofu Casserole
description: A comforting plantbased casserole with smoky tandoori tofu, juicy cherry tomatoes, and a golden cheesy crust, inspired by Syrian flavors.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine crumbled tofu, tandoori masala, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper. Mix until tofu is evenly coated.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add sliced onion and minced garlic; sauté until soft, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato halves and cook for another 3 minutes until they start to soften.
Pour the tofu mixture into the skillet, stir gently to combine, and cook for 5 minutes until the tofu starts to brown.
Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish. Sprinkle shredded vegan cheddar and nutritional yeast over the top, then scatter chopped parsley.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20–25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
